Bond.capacityHint: You may hold rank B-or-higher Bonds with a number of characters equal to your Charm half-score.
Bond.noneYet: No bonds yet — forge your first.
Bond.forgeHint: Drop a Character (Party Bond) or an NPC (Follower Bond) to open a bond.
Bond.noSelfBond: A character can't bond with themselves.

Bond.sceneUsed: This pair already shared a Bond Scene this rest.
Bond.readyHint: Threshold met — the next Bond Scene the pair shares becomes the rank-up.
Bond.followerBenefits: Follower Benefits · shaped with the GM
Bond.unionDesc: At rank S the pair builds one shared Skill: split the SP cost, both Actions in one Phase, within 2 tiles, each pays half EP.
Bond.unionDrop: Build a Skill, then drop it here to make it this bond's Union Skill.
Bond.unionNeedsSkill: Drop a Skill to set the Union Skill.
Bond.unionOwnSkill: The Union Skill must be one of your own Skills.

Bond.breakNeedsGM: A GM must break this Party Bond (you don't control the partner).

rankUpFail.notReady: Not enough Bond Points to rank up yet.
rankUpFail.capacitySelf: You're at your rank-B+ Bond capacity (Charm half-score).

standingFail.noCombat: Standing Together is earned during a Conflict.
standingFail.standing: This pair already earned Standing Together this Conflict.

sideBySide.name: Side by Side
sideBySide.desc: +1 to hit while within 1 tile of your partner.

backToBack.name: Back to Back
backToBack.desc: +1 DEF and +1 RES while within 1 tile of your partner.

dualStrike.name: Dual Strike
dualStrike.desc: Once per Conflict, when your partner hits a foe, immediately make a Basic Attack against it if it's within your range.

welcome.name: Welcome
welcome.desc: Small favors — shelter for a night, an introduction, what they know of local matters.

aid.name: Aid
aid.desc: Choose one when you reach this rank:

lesson.name: Lesson
lesson.desc: Teaches a unique Modifier only you may take — add it to a Skill through Expansion at the normal cost.

devotion.name: Devotion
devotion.desc: Once per Season they intervene decisively on your behalf; you may also learn one Skill they know, paying its SP.

effect.concealed: Passes as a mundane object; Hard (13) Test to find.
effect.fitted: Trade 1 Protection for +1 Evasion, up to the printed penalty.
effect.insulated: Step Up both dice on Checks to endure natural extremes.
effect.luminous: Sheds light to 3 tiles, on command.
effect.marked: You always know the distance to this item.
effect.socket: The item gains one empty Socket.
effect.sturdy: Step Up both dice to resist Disarm or Steal.
effect.warded: Step Up both dice on Overcome Checks against your chosen Status.

effect.elixir: Restore a creature within 1 tile to full HP or full EP.
effect.fieldMeal: During a Camp, restore +2 HP and EP. One per character per Camp.
effect.wardSalve: Gain Resist to your chosen Damage Type for the Scene.

Specialty.label: Specialty

benefit.brewer: Batches contain 4. Once per rest, brew one Tier above the party.
benefit.fieldcrafter: Make one Craft Activity during a Camp with an Artisan's Kit.
benefit.salvager: Recover half a removed Trait's cost. Once per rest, convert 3 Commons into 2 of another type.
benefit.smith: Forging costs no Gold. Trait bills cost 1 Common less (min 1).
benefit.steward: One HQ gathering facility yields double. Project Stages cost 1 Common less (min 1).

Specialty.downtimeOnly: Learned at a rest, with Storyteller approval.

Craft.noCrafter: No character available to craft with.
Craft.noSlots: No Craft Activities left — spend one at a rest.
Craft.gateWarn: Crafting outside a Town needs an Artisan's Kit and the Fieldcrafter Specialty.

Socket.label: Socket
Socket.destroyWarn: Removing the Socket destroys its content.

Roll.followUpTrigger: {name} is fast enough for a Follow-Up Attack!
Roll.checkHint: Click to roll a Check with this attribute
Roll.cover: Cover — target the creature that takes this hit, then click.
Roll.goAgainLuck: {name} combos through the Go Again — one Luck Die returns as {value}.
Roll.goAgainLuckTuned: {name} combos through the Go Again — a Luck Die turns {from} → {to}.
Roll.goAgainLuckBound: That Luck Die is already at its limit.
Roll.chargeHitCarried: The focus turn's hit carries — no new roll.
Roll.allyNotSelf: This Skill targets an ally — it can't be used on yourself. Target an ally first.
Roll.allyNotFoe: This Skill targets an ally — that creature is an enemy.
Roll.foeOnly: This Skill targets a foe — that creature isn't an enemy.
Roll.noneAffectable: No one the Skill can affect was caught in the area.
Roll.coverNoTarget: Target the covering creature first (one target), then click Cover.
Roll.coverSame: Target a different creature to cover this hit.
Roll.chargeReleases: Releases at double power on your next turn.
Roll.devourNotDefeated: Target must be reduced to 0 HP to Devour.
Roll.devourNoSkills: {name} has no new Skills to Devour.
Roll.devourPick: Choose a Skill to copy from {name}
Roll.devourAlwaysOn: Passive — automatically Devours a Skill whenever you reduce a creature to 0 HP.
Roll.luckSameDie: You can't spend one Luck die on both dice.
Roll.luckNoActor: No assigned character to spend Luck from.
Roll.luckLocked: Luck can't change a Fumble or Combo.
Roll.noGM: No active GM is online to apply this.
Roll.steppedUpProne: Target is Prone — Accuracy dice Stepped Up.
Roll.cursedNoRecovery: {name} is Cursed — no Hit Points or Energy regained.
Roll.placeBurst: Click to place the Burst · right-click to cancel
Roll.placeLine: Aim the Line and click · right-click to cancel
Roll.needToken: Place this character's token on the scene to aim this Skill.
Roll.aoeNoTargets: No targets caught in the area.
Roll.auraAffectsAlly: Aura — affects you and allies within {n} tiles.
Roll.auraAffectsAny: Aura — affects every creature within {n} tiles, including you.
Roll.placeGateA: Click to place the first gate · right-click to cancel
Roll.placeGateB: Click to place the second gate · right-click to cancel
Roll.gateOpened: Two linked gates open — any creature can step into one and emerge from the other.
Roll.senseSteppedUp: Mind + Spirit, one die Stepped Up
Roll.overcomeEnds: {name} shakes off {effect} — immune to it for the next 2 rounds.

Servant.name: {name} (Servant)
Servant.notDead: Animate raises the dead — the target must be at 0 HP.
Servant.alreadyBound: That creature is already a servant or companion.
Servant.taxLine: {tier} servant — reduces your maximum Energy by {n} while it serves.
Servant.dismissConfirm: Dismiss {name}? It is released and its raised form is lost — your locked Energy returns.
Servant.notYours: Only the servant's owner can dismiss it.
Servant.companionBonded: {name} is bonded to {master} — it acts on their turn.
Servant.companionCreated: {name} is bonded to {master} as a loyal companion.

Talent.hint: Work dice the HQ taps — what this member is good at on the job.

Hud.dragHint: Drag Skills · weapons · items from your sheet → slots

Hud.noPermission: You don't have permission to edit this character's HUD.

party.title: Party
party.dragHint: Drag to move · double-click to minimize

NaturalAttack.name: Unarmed Strike
NaturalAttack.hint: Natural attack — always available, costs no Energy

effectDesc.affinity: Legacy Effect — gain an Affinity to a Damage Type. New Skills use the Affinity / Immunity / Absorb Modifiers instead.
effectDesc.animate: Legacy Effect (moved to Modules) — raise a dead creature as a servant under your control. It acts on your turn and reduces your maximum Energy by its tier. No Modifiers.
effectDesc.bolster: Choose one Attribute. Step Up that Attribute on an ally at weapon range. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.companion: A creature is bonded to you as a loyal ally — all-d6 Attributes, its own HP and Energy, acting on your turn. Cannot have Modifiers.
effectDesc.conjure: Create a mundane weapon, armor, or object out of nothing at weapon range. It vanishes at the end of the Scene.
effectDesc.disguise: Alter your appearance to look and sound like another person, creature, or object roughly your size. Targets Mind or Charm (chosen at creation). Duration: 2.
effectDesc.elementalControl: Choose an element: generate, move, or suppress it at weapon range. Does not work on creatures made of the element.
effectDesc.gate: Create linked gates at two open tiles within weapon range.
effectDesc.hinder: Choose one Attribute. On hit, Step Down that Attribute on a foe at weapon range.
effectDesc.illusion: Create an illusion only your target can see — it acts on what it believes. Targets Mind or Charm (chosen at creation). Duration: 2.
effectDesc.mend: Restore HP or EP (chosen at creation) to a willing creature at weapon range equal to Power.
effectDesc.passive: No Effect — the Skill exists entirely through its Modifiers (0 SP minimum). Cannot take the Secondary Effect Modifier.
effectDesc.sense: Choose a type of sense. You detect all creatures within 5 tiles that your sense can find. Lasts 2 rounds.
effectDesc.steal: Take an item from the target's inventory. Stealing equipped items needs the Disarm Modifier.
effectDesc.strike: Attack a foe at weapon range. On hit, deal damage equal to Power minus the target's DEF or RES, set by the Skill's type.
effectDesc.telepathy: Speak mind to mind with any creature within weapon range; the unwilling can block you out. Targets Mind or Spirit (chosen at creation). Duration: 2.
effectDesc.transform: Choose one or two Attributes. If one, Step Up by two; if two, Step Up each by one. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.vanish: You cannot be seen. Attacking reveals you. Targets Mind or Spirit (chosen at creation).
effectDesc.custom: Custom effects are created between Player and Storyteller. They can have anything that is not listed here.

modifierDesc.none: This Skill doesn't have a Modifier and its abilities rely on the Effect. Adds no SP or EP cost.
modifierDesc.absorb: Heavy. Choose a Damage Type. Target takes no damage from that type and regains HP equal to the damage instead.
modifierDesc.affinityDamage: Choose a Damage Type. Target gains Resist to it, taking 2 less damage from that type. Can be taken more than once.
modifierDesc.affinityStatus: Choose a Status Effect. Target gains Resist to it, halving the duration. Can be taken more than once.
modifierDesc.analyze: On hit, learn one category about the target: current HP & Energy, Attributes, Skills, or Affinities.
modifierDesc.aura: This Skill becomes a field within 2 tiles of yourself, granting its Effect(s) to the type of target the Skill can already affect — Allies (and you), Foes (never you), or Any creature. A passive aura is always on; an active aura lasts for its Duration, then ends.
modifierDesc.banish: Send the target to its native plane at Storyteller's discretion. Targets Spirit.
modifierDesc.burst: Affects everything within 2 tiles of a chosen point in the Skill's Range.
modifierDesc.chain: On hit, leaps to 1 additional target within 3 tiles. Roll to hit each target.
modifierDesc.channeled: Replaces the Skill's Duration: it lasts as long as you pay 1 EP at the start of your turn. You may dismiss it on your turn for free.
modifierDesc.charge: Spend a turn focusing and roll to hit. On hit, the Skill resolves next turn with double damage or healing. On a miss, the Charge fades.
modifierDesc.cleanse: Remove one Status Effect from the target.
modifierDesc.combo: When you use this Skill, you may also activate another Skill alongside it.
modifierDesc.cover: You take the damage for the target if it is within the Skill's range.
modifierDesc.devour: Heavy. Target must be at 0 HP. You learn one Skill it knows.
modifierDesc.disarm: This Skill can steal or remove equipped items. Make a contested roll using ACC against the target's Might + Agility or Might + Spirit.
modifierDesc.drainEnergy: Choose Energy. When you deal damage with this Skill, recover EP equal to half the damage dealt.
modifierDesc.drainHP: Choose HP. When you deal damage with this Skill, recover HP equal to half the damage dealt.
modifierDesc.immunity: Heavy. Choose a Damage Type or Status Effect. Target is Immune to it.
modifierDesc.inflict: On a hit, apply a Status Effect you choose when creating the Skill. Lingering deals 1 damage at the end of each of the target's turns for the duration.
modifierDesc.infuse: Choose a Damage Type. The target's weapons deal the chosen Damage Type for the duration.
modifierDesc.line: Hits all valid targets in a straight line up to the Skill's range.
modifierDesc.manifest: One of your Passive Skills becomes active only while this Skill is running. That Passive does not reduce your max EP while Manifested.
modifierDesc.mass: Heavy. Hits all valid targets in the Skill's range.
modifierDesc.mental: This Skill targets the mind. Choose Mind, Spirit, or Charm. Targets the chosen Attribute instead of EVA.
modifierDesc.move: Move the target. If the target is you, move up to your MOV. If another creature, move it up to 2 tiles.
modifierDesc.nullify: End one ongoing Skill on the target. Targets Spirit.
modifierDesc.pierce: This Skill ignores the target's DEF or RES.
modifierDesc.protection: Increase the target's DEF or RES by 1 (chosen at creation).
modifierDesc.pull: Pull the target 2 tiles toward you.
modifierDesc.push: Push the target 2 tiles away from you.
modifierDesc.reequip: Before or after using this Skill, switch one piece of equipment.
modifierDesc.retaliation: While active, foes that damage the target take 2 damage. Damage type chosen at creation.
modifierDesc.scene: This Skill lasts the entire Scene.
modifierDesc.secondaryEffect: Heavy. The Skill gains a second Effect. You must meet the second Effect's minimum cost.
modifierDesc.waypoint: You can place a permanent gate at a named location you visit. You and designated creatures can travel between your gates and waypoints.
modifierDesc.custom: This Skill has a custom effect that was determined by the Player and the Storyteller. This modifier may also have the Heavy trait.

narr.transfers: transfers up to {dmg} of the caster's own {pool}
narr.targetWeapon: a target within your weapon's reach
narr.everyone: everything within {n} tiles of a chosen point
narr.pierce: ignores the target's DEF or RES
narr.chain: leaps to {n} more target(s) within 3 tiles, rolling to hit each
narr.drainHP: You heal for half the damage dealt.
narr.drainEnergy: You recover Energy equal to half the damage dealt.
narr.drainHPPassive: Your basic attacks heal you for half the damage dealt.
narr.drainEnergyPassive: Your basic attacks recover Energy equal to half the damage dealt.
narr.decay: Afterward, the target takes {dmg} Lingering damage at the end of each of their turns while it lasts.
narr.decayTyped: Afterward, the target takes {dmg} {element} Lingering damage at the end of each of their turns while it lasts.
narr.cleanse: It removes a Status Effect from the target.
narr.cover: You take the damage in place of any target within the Skill's Range.
narr.charge: You first spend a turn focusing; on your next turn it resolves at double power.
narr.moveMod: moves you up to {self} tiles, or your target up to {n} tiles, in a direction of your choice
narr.moveModNoActor: moves you up to your Movement, or your target up to {n} tiles, in a direction of your choice
narr.retaliation: While active, foes that damage the target take {dmg} damage.
narr.retaliationTyped: While active, foes that damage the target take {dmg} {element} damage.
narr.analyze: On a hit, you learn the target's {category}.
narr.banish: On a hit, the target is sent to its native plane of existence (it may use Spirit to evade).
narr.infuse: It imbues the target's weapons with {thing}.
narr.manifest: One of your Passive Skills runs as Active while this lasts (it stops taxing your maximum Energy).
narr.combo: When you use it, you may also activate another Skill alongside it.
narr.disarm: It can steal or remove EQUIPPED items — a contested roll of its Accuracy against the target's Might + Agility or Might + Spirit.
narr.waypoint: At a named location you may place a permanent waypoint; you and designated creatures can travel between your gates and waypoints.
narr.affinityStatusResist: The target gains Resist to {thing} — its duration is halved.
narr.nullify: On a hit, it ends one ongoing Skill on the target (it may use Spirit to evade).
narr.reequip: Before or after using it, you may swap one or two weapons, an armor, or one accessory.
narr.reequipHeavy: Before or after using it, you may swap your entire equipment loadout.
narr.onHit: On a hit, the target gains {status}.
narr.skillEvasionLine: The target evades with {attr} in place of Agility.
narr.skillEvasionLinePair: The target evades with the better of {attr} in place of Agility.
narr.animate: It raises a dead creature within range as a servant under your control — it returns with the Hit Points, Energy, Attributes, and Skills it had in life (losing any Skill ranked above this one, and any Animate or Companion Skill), and acts on your turn with its own Move and Action.
narr.animateTiers: While the servant exists, it reduces your maximum Energy by its tier: Minion {minion} · Standard {standard} · Elite {elite} · Solo {solo}.
narr.companion: A creature is bonded to you as a loyal ally — its Attributes are all d6 with its own Hit Points and Energy, and it acts on your turn with its own Move and Action. You may spend SP to advance it like a Player Character.
narr.conjure: It creates a mundane weapon, armor, or object out of nothing within range; a weapon or armor conjures straight to its slot. The conjuration vanishes at the end of the Scene.
narr.disguise: You look and sound like another person, creature, or object roughly your own size until the Scene ends or you dismiss it; a creature that beats the Check sees through it.
narr.elementalControl: Choose an element: you can generate it from nothing, move an existing piece of it up to the Skill's range, or suppress it. It does not work on creatures made of the element.
narr.elementalControlTyped: You command {element}: generate it from nothing, move an existing piece of it up to the Skill's range, or suppress it. It does not work on creatures made of the element.
narr.gate: It opens linked gates at two open tiles within range — any creature can step into one and emerge from the other — lasting until the Scene ends or you dismiss it.
narr.illusion: It creates an illusion only your targets can perceive; on a hit they act on what they believe, at the Storyteller's discretion.
narr.steal: On a hit, it snatches a carried item from the target's possession.
narr.stealEquipped: On a hit, it snatches an item from the target's possession — even something EQUIPPED, won through a Contested Check against the target's Might + Agility or Might + Spirit.
narr.telepathy: You speak mind to mind with any creature within range; an unwilling creature blocks you out unless your Check beats its Skill Evasion, after which the link lasts the duration or Scene, whichever is shorter.
narr.vanish: You cannot be seen for the duration. Attacking a creature reveals you; a creature actively looking for you must beat your Check against its Skill Evasion to find you.
narr.senseVanish: A Vanished creature inside your sense can be found: roll Mind + Spirit — one die Stepped Up — against its Skill Evasion.
narr.passiveCarrier: This Skill is always active — its Modifiers apply continuously.
narr.channeledLine: It lasts while you channel it: spend {n} Energy at the start of each of your turns or it ends.
narr.passiveLine: This Skill is always active and costs no Energy, but lowers your maximum Energy by {n} while known.
narr.auraLineAlly: As an aura, it applies to you and allies within {n} tiles of you.
narr.auraLineEnemy: As an aura, it applies to enemies within {n} tiles of you.
narr.auraLineAny: As an aura, it applies to every creature within {n} tiles of you, including yourself.

Effect.title: Effects
Effect.applyNoTarget: Select a token (or assign a character) to apply the effect to.
Effect.removeFromItem: {name} comes from {item} — unequip or remove that item to clear it.
Effect.removeNoPermission: You don't have permission to remove that effect.
Effect.name: Name
Effect.toggleableHint: Player flips this on/off (off by default) — for a situational boon like "+1 Charm vs nobles".
Effect.channelEnd: {name} can no longer pay for {skill} — the channel ends.
Effect.stunnedSkip: {name} is Stunned and skips their turn.
Effect.recovered: {name} recovers to {hp} HP as combat ends.
Effect.comboTurn: {name} takes an extra turn from the Combo!
Effect.extraAction: {name} cuts in for an extra action — {n} of {total}!

hqDeathStrikes.name: HQ — Lethal Dispatch (variant)
hqDeathStrikes.hint: When on, a dispatch agent who rolls a natural 1 on three missions is lost for good; otherwise a failed mission only ever wounds. Death is earned by bad luck over time, not by any single mission.

craftRequireFacilities.name: Crafting — Enforce Facility Requirements
craftRequireFacilities.hint: When on, a Workshop recipe that lists required facilities can only be crafted once those facilities are built to the listed tier. Turn off to gate recipes on Workshop tier and resource cost alone.

partySettings.name: Headquarters

partySettings.hint: Options for Headquarters, including the Factions & Home panes.
partySettings.title: Headquarters Settings
partySettings.factionsTabHint: Adds the Factions and Home panes to Headquarters — the world's factions and their standing (fed by Chronicle reputation rewards) and the HQ built from recruited members. The GM authors them; everyone can view.

rangeLine.name: Canvas — Range Line
rangeLine.hint: Hovering a token while one of yours is selected draws a measured line between them with the tile distance. Each player can hide it for themselves from the Token scene controls.

trackerVisible.name: Quests — Show Tracker
trackerVisible.hint: Show the floating on-canvas tracker for the quest you're following. The tracker's eye-slash button also hides it; tracking a quest turns it back on.

phaseBanner.name: Combat — Phase Banner (show for me)
phaseBanner.hint: Sweep a PLAYER PHASE / ENEMY PHASE banner across the screen when the side phase flips.

comboSplash.name: Combat — Combo Splash
comboSplash.hint: A cinematic full-screen flash when someone rolls a Combo (matching 6+).
comboSplash.clientHint: Hide the Combo flash just for you; the table setting stays on for everyone else.

accentColor.name: Sheets — Player Accent Color
accentColor.hint: Tints your character sheets — window trim, glow, Energy bar, and highlights. Every player sees their own color.

enabled.name: Cinematic HUD
enabled.hint: Replace the macro hotbar and the bottom-left names with the anime HUD console + party rail. Turn this off to use Foundry's default bars.

selectMode.name: Bar Follows
selectMode.hint: My Character keeps the bar on your assigned character. Selected Token makes it follow whichever token you own and have selected — driving that creature's full stats + sidebars without opening its sheet.

intensity.name: HUD Style Intensity
intensity.hint: How much anime-HUD flourish: Restrained (subtle), Cinematic (balanced), or Full Anime (skewed slots, scanlines, stronger glow).

party.name: Show Party HUD
party.hint: Show party member cards at the lower-left (draggable) in place of the names list.

combat.name: Encounter Tracker
combat.hint: During combat, show the turn order + initiative next to the chat, with an End Turn button for players.

hudSettings.name: Cinematic HUD
hudSettings.label: Configure HUD
hudSettings.hint: Enable/disable the HUD console, party rail, and encounter tracker, and choose the style — all in one place.
hudSettings.title: Cinematic HUD

encounterPower.name: Monsters — Encounter Power
encounterPower.hint: The party-power baseline the Monster Creator scales from (≈ a typical PC's total Skill Points). Raise it as the party advances so newly-built monsters keep up.

Advancement.title: Advancement
Advancement.maxed: That attribute is already at d12.
Advancement.vitalsSet: Set HP to {hp} and Energy to {energy} from attributes.
Advancement.refineWarn: Skill Enhancement is earned with the Refine activity during a rest.

Rest.title: Rest
Rest.campRecent: {names} camped within the last 24 hours. Rest anyway?

SkillBuilder.title: Skill Builder
SkillBuilder.passiveNoMod: This Skill can't take that Modifier.
SkillBuilder.servantNoEffect: A Servant or Companion can't take Animate or Companion.

SkillLog.title: Skill Point Log
SkillLog.confirmAttribute: Undo “{label}” and every higher raise stacked on it, refunding {amount} SP total?

Creator.title: Character Creator
Creator.stepsRemaining: Distribute all your Step-Ups first ({n} left).
Creator.choiceMissing: That option's package could not be found.

MonsterCreator.title: Monster Creator
MonsterCreator.pickRoleTierFirst: Pick a Role and a Tier first.
MonsterCreator.twistOver: 3+ Twists — this should be an Elite.

SkillBrowser.title: Skill Compendium
SkillBrowser.missing: That skill's source could not be found.

counter.name: Counter
counter.desc: React · Attack from range 1: strike back first.

drainTouch.name: Drain Touch
drainTouch.desc: On hit, recover HP equal to half the damage dealt.

dreadAura.name: Dread Aura
dreadAura.desc: Passive · Foes within 2 tiles Step Down Charm.

guard.name: Guard
guard.desc: React · An ally within 2 tiles is attacked: take the hit instead.

mend.name: Mend
mend.desc: Restore HP equal to the Strong die value to an ally within range 3.

reinforce.name: Reinforce
reinforce.desc: One Swarm of the same tier arrives at a board edge.

sweep.name: Sweep
sweep.desc: Attack all targets within 2 tiles of a point in range.

warcry.name: Warcry
warcry.desc: Allies within 2 tiles Step Up one Attribute (Duration 2).

EnemyRole.label: Role
EnemyRole.strongPickHint: An Elite picks three Strong Attributes; the rest use the Weak die.
EnemyRole.gruntBlurb: Chaff — its threat is numbers and position, not damage.
EnemyRole.bruteBlurb: A heavy hitter: more HP and ATK, slow and easy to dodge.
EnemyRole.skirmisherBlurb: Fast and evasive — may cross the Follow-Up line.
EnemyRole.casterBlurb: The damage. Attacks target RES; magic answers armour.
EnemyRole.supportBlurb: Buffs and denies with two Twists; hits softly.
EnemyRole.swarmBlurb: One flat-HP body that bounces off armour and hunts the back line.
EnemyRole.eliteBlurb: A cut above: tougher, sharper, and carries a Twist.

EnemyTier.label: Tier
EnemyTier.pickHint: The party's power band. Strong die = the tier die; Weak die is two steps down.

Threat.label: Threat
Threat.hint: Threat — this enemy's cost against the encounter budget.
Threat.swarmHalf: Swarms may not exceed half the budget.

Rival.label: Rival
Rival.badgeHint: A recurring named villain built on full PC rules — counts as Elite + 1 Threat and grows with the party.
Rival.toggle: Rival — grows with the party (Elite + 1 Threat)

Boss.label: Boss
Boss.badgeHint: One enemy built to fight the whole party. Its HP is split into Bars.
Boss.barsHint: The Boss takes one full turn per remaining Bar. A broken Bar loses excess damage, ends its statuses, and may let it Shift.
Boss.barBroken: {name}'s Bar breaks! ({remaining} of {total} left) — statuses cleared; it may Shift.
Boss.defeated: {name}'s last Bar breaks — the Boss is defeated!

Party.name: Party
Party.squadSizeHint: Squad size — its members share one pooled HP bar and strike as one unit.
Party.membersArePCs: Only Player Characters go in the party roster.
Party.encounterAreMonsters: Only NPCs (monsters) go in the encounter.
Party.itemsAreGear: Only items (not Skills) can be stashed.
Party.deleteConfirm: Delete the party "{name}"? Its sidebar folder is removed too — member characters are kept (they fall back to the directory root).

openParty.name: Open Party Sheet
openParty.hint: Open your party's sheet — the party whose folder holds a character you own, or the first party.

openQuestLog.name: Open Quest Log
openQuestLog.hint: Open Headquarters to the Quests pane (the campaign quest log).

openHome.name: Open Home (HQ)
openHome.hint: Open Headquarters to the Home pane.

openCodex.name: Open Codex
openCodex.hint: Open Headquarters to the Codex (encyclopedia) pane.
